playbook.intent: Catch cost spikes within 24h → decide if model-routing, caching, or context-engineering change is needed before billing close.
playbook.scope: Catch cost spikes within 24h. Decide if model-routing, caching, or context-engineering change is needed before billing close. ~15 min daily.

stage.name: Read

tasks.task: Pull token usage and success counts

stage.decision-gate: Advance to Decide only when above SLO band.

stage.name: Decide Lever

tasks.task: Inspect cascade for over-spend on weak path

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a single lever is picked.

stage.name: Ship Or Log
stage.intent: Ship the cheapest lever or schedule for tomorrow.
stage.decision-gate: Close ritual only after log entry is written.

extra.value: [Long-term cost reforecasting — separate playbook, Vendor contract negotiation]
[Per-trajectory cost tagged in OTEL, Cost dashboard reachable]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']
{human: faion get-content token-cost-daily-watch --format md, agent: faion get-content token-cost-daily-watch --format context, json: faion get-content token-cost-daily-watch --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
